title: eragrostis tenuifolia
intro: Eragrostis tenuifolia, also known as Thai lemongrass, is a type of grass native to Southeast Asia and is commonly used in traditional medicine. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Eragrostis tenuifolia include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Eragrostis tenuifolia can be prepared as an herbal tea, oil, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
